DP.282.0000:
Welcome to the Battle Tower!\f
I am your guide to the Single
and Double Battle Rooms.\f
DP.282.0001:
Would you like to take the
Battle Room challenge?
DP.282.0002: We hope to see you again!
DP.282.0003:
The Battle Tower’s Single Battle
Rooms are facilities for conducting\r
Single Battles with three Pokémon.\f
Similarly, the Double Battle Rooms
are facilities for conducting Double\r
Battles with four Pokémon.\f
There are many Battle Rooms in the
Battle Tower for team battles.\f
In each of the Battle Rooms, seven
Trainers await your challenge.\f
If you manage to defeat all seven,
you will earn Battle Points (BP).\f
If you want to interrupt your
challenge, please save the game.\f
If you don’t save, you will be
disqualified from your challenge.\f
DP.282.0004:
Which Battle Room would you like?
Single or Double?
DP.282.0008:
Please select the Pokémon you wish
to enter.\f
DP.282.0009: Your Pokémon must all be different.\f
DP.282.0010: Hold items must all be different.\f
DP.282.0011:
I will now show you to the
Battle Room.
DP.282.0012:
Congratulations!
You’ve beaten all seven Trainers!\f
DP.282.0013:
Congratulations!
You’ve beaten the Tower Tycoon!\f
We present you with these Battle
Points in recognition of your talent!\f
[0103,0000] received
[0132,0001] BP!\f
DP.282.0014:
Saving...
Don’t turn off the power.
DP.282.0015: We hope to see you again.
DP.282.0016:
We’ve been waiting for you!\f
Before entering a Battle Room, your
progress will be saved.\f
Saving...
Don’t turn off the power.
DP.282.0019:
Excuse me!\f
You didn’t save before you quit your
challenge last time.\f
Because of that, you have been
disqualified from your challenge!\f
DP.282.0020:
Welcome to the Battle Tower!\f
I am your guide to the Multi
Battle Rooms.\f
DP.282.0021:
Would you like to take the Multi
Battle Room challenge?
DP.282.0023:
The Battle Tower’s Multi Battle
Rooms are facilities for conducting\r
Multi Battles.\f
For Multi Battles, you must partner
with a Trainer in the tower and enter\r
with two Pokémon each.\f
Inside the tower is a room named
the Battle Salon where you can meet\r
other Trainers.\f
There, you must find a Trainer to act
as your partner in the Multi Battles.\f
Once you have partnered up, you will
be shown to a Multi Battle Room.\f
In the Multi Battle Room, seven
tag teams await your challenge.\f
If you manage to defeat all seven
teams, you will earn Battle Points.\f
If you want to interrupt your
challenge, please save the game.\f
If you don’t save, you will be
disqualified from your challenge.\f
Also, if you are in a tag team with
a friend, you may not interrupt your\r
challenge.\f
DP.282.0026:
Would you like to communicate with
a friend and form a tag team?
DP.282.0027:
One Trainer should select
“BECOME LEADER.”\f
The other Trainer must select
“JOIN GROUP.”
DP.282.0032:
I’ll direct you to your
Multi Battle Room now.
DP.282.0033:
Both Trainers have chosen the
Pokémon [0100,0000].\f
Please confer with the other Trainer
and choose different Pokémon.\f
DP.282.0034:
Both Trainers have chosen the
Pokémon [0100,0000] and\r
[0100,0001].\f
Please confer with the other Trainer
and choose different Pokémon.\f
DP.282.0035:
I will now show you to the
Battle Salon.\f
DP.282.0036:
Welcome to the Battle Tower!\f
I am your guide to the Wi-Fi
Battle Rooms.\f
DP.282.0037:
Would you like to take the Wi-Fi
Battle Room challenge?
DP.282.0038:
The Battle Tower’s Wi-Fi Battle Rooms
are places to conduct battles over\r
Nintendo Wi-Fi Connection (WFC).\f
In Wi-Fi Battles, you will be battling
Trainers from around the world over\r
Nintendo WFC.\f
Inside the Battle Tower, there are
many Battle Rooms.\f
In each of the Battle Rooms, seven
Trainers await your challenge.\f
If you manage to defeat all seven,
you will earn Battle Points.\f
Depending on how you do, you may
even become the room’s leader!\f
Also, the Wi-Fi Battle Rooms are
operated on a ranking system.\f
Trainers will go up in rank if they
keep winning Wi-Fi Battles.\f
Contrarily, their rankings could go
down if they lose consistently.\f
To raise your rank, keep winning,
especially against tougher Trainers.\f
If you want to interrupt your
challenge, please save the game.\f
If you don’t save, you will be
disqualified from your challenge.\f
DP.282.0039: We hope to see you again!
DP.282.0047:
OK. I’ll direct you to your Battle
Room now.\f
Are you ready?
DP.282.0048:
Would you like to save and
interrupt your challenge?
DP.282.0052:
I’ve downloaded the Rank [0133,0000], Battle
Room [0134,0001]’s past leader history.\f
Please confirm it on the Performance
Monitor next to me.
DP.282.0054:
Congratulations!
You’ve beaten all seven Trainers!\f
DP.282.0055:
[0103,0000], you have also been
promoted to Rank [0133,0001]!\f
DP.282.0056:
Saving...
Don’t turn off the power.
DP.282.0057:
Would you like to send these results
using Nintendo WFC?
DP.282.0058:
For your 7-win streak, we present
you these Battle Points!\f
[0103,0000] obtained
[0132,0001] BP.\f
DP.282.0060:
Your results were sent out using
Nintendo WFC!\f
DP.282.0061:
It’s good to see you back.\f
Your previous results were not sent
out using Nintendo WFC.\f
Would you like to send them now?
DP.282.0065:
It’s very unfortunate, but you have
been demoted to Rank [0133,0000]...\f
DP.282.0069:
Your record will be saved.
Please wait.
DP.282.0070:
Congratulations on achieving
Rank [0133,0000].\f
Your winning Pokémon team has won
special Ribbons for this feat!
DP.282.0071:
Congratulations on achieving [0134,0000]
consecutive wins!\f
Your winning Pokémon team has been
given a special award for this feat!
DP.282.0073:
Congratulations on achieving your
50-win streak.\f
Your winning Pokémon team has won
special Ribbons for this feat!
DP.282.0074:
Yeah, I used to live in a place
called Hoenn.\f
There was a place like this back
there, too.
DP.282.0075:
The Wi-Fi Battle Rooms are full of
surprises.\f
Can you imagine running into an old
rival who moved far away?\f
Who knows what cool encounters you’ll
have?
DP.282.0076:
They profile you on TV if you set
a good record here.\f
This is my only chance to regain
my glory as an Idol!
DP.282.0077:
I trained my little guy till we
couldn’t take any more.\f
He’s going to do a 100-win streak
for sure...\f
Right, PIKACHU?
DP.282.0079:
Ooh-la-la!
You look tremendously powerful!\f
Verily, I shall look forward to
engaging you in a battle.
DP.282.0080:
There are so many tough Trainers
around...\f
It’s scary, but let’s do our best,
PIKACHU!
DP.282.0082:
Congratulations on achieving
a 50-win streak!\f
The Pokémon on your team will be
provided with commemorative Ribbons.
DP.282.0083:
Congratulations on advancing to
Rank [0132,0000]!\f
The Pokémon on your team will be
provided with commemorative Ribbons.
DP.282.0084:
Congratulations on defeating
the Tower Tycoon!\f
The Pokémon on your team will be
provided with commemorative Ribbons.
DP.282.0085:
Congratulations on achieving
your [0134,0000]-win streak!\f
Please accept this trophy for your
fantastic achievement!\f
DP.282.0086:
...Uh-oh... You’ve run out of room
for decoration goods.\f
Please make room, and come back
for your prize.

You don’t have [0132,0000] eligible Pokémon.\f

to enter.\f
They also must be holding different
kinds of items.\f
Eggs are not allowed to enter.\f
Please come see me when you are
ready.\f

DP.282.0107:
Thank you so much for participating!
Please come again!
DP.282.0108:
Hi, there!\f
Can you tell me how you’d introduce
yourself before a battle, and what\r
you’d say if you won or lost?
DP.282.0109:
OK! So, how would you introduce
yourself before a battle?
DP.282.0110:
OK! So, what would you say if 
you lost a battle?
DP.282.0111:
OK! So, what would you say if 
you won a battle?
DP.282.0112:
Thanks for telling me. You’d say
“[011C]”...
DP.282.0113:
Oh? You’re not going to tell me?
That’s too bad...
DP.282.0114:
There doesn’t appear to be any
data yet...\f
DP.282.0115:
DS Wireless Communications will
be launched.
DP.282.0116: We look forward to your next visit.\f
